prompt:
Summarize the substrate-suite architecture from these 5 file paths in 8 sentences max, citing each file at least once:
- ~/apps/adam/README.md
- ~/apps/adam/tools/khazina/CLAUDE.md
- ~/apps/adam/tools/mizan/README.md (if present)
- ~/apps/adam/tools/burhan/README.md (if present)
- ~/apps/adam/tools/daftar/README.md (if present)
If a file is missing, say so explicitly and continue. The summary must mention atom-0007, mizan_check_action_safety, and the cite-graph traversal.
notes: Multi-file synthesis with explicit verification requirements.
